atf.headline: Pioneering a New Era of Freedom
atf.tagline: LOGOS is a movement building open technology to enable and restore civil society.

build.description: Everything you need to start building privacy-first decentralized applications. Explore ideas, find bounties, and connect with others.
build.row1Desc: Build a bank powered by logic you've programmed
build.row2Desc: Create tokens that you can transfer and use across applications
build.row3Desc: Use existing languages to interact with Lorem Ipsum and other applications
build.row4Desc: Re-imagine existing services as decentralized, open applications

node.description: The Node Program is for anyone who wants to join our movement to revitalize civil society using decentralized technologies.

circles.description: Local chapters are at the heart of our movement. Learn civil organizing, share skills, and forge new connections.

about.quote: The system is no longer working for us, so we are charting a new course.
about.headline: Logos exists at the intersection of human exploration and technological revolution.
about.body: We are a movement for builders, explorers, and dreamers who refuse to accept the world as it is. We're part of a generation fed up with corruption, surveillance, and stagnation often associated with incumbent institutions.

techStack.tagline: A unified ecosystem. Private-by-default. Built for real life.
techStack.title: The Logos Technology Stack
techStack.networkingStack: The Networking Stack: Discovery, Peering, and Mix-Net

useCases.tagline: We know today's systems are captured and brittle. We build alternatives to give people a choice. Build on Logos and serve your community.
useCases.tagline2: Privacy-preserving blockchain for sovereign order and decentralised governance.
useCases.title: Use Cases
useCases.card1Desc: Privacy-preserving blockchain for sovereign order and decentralised governance.
useCases.card2Desc: Permanent, censorship-proof preservation of knowledge, culture, and history.
useCases.card3Desc: Money that moves securely and freely, without surveillance or control.
useCases.card4Desc: Self-organising groups can establish and enforce their own rules, with members engaging voluntarily.

parallelSociety.headline: Parallel Society is a two-day event in Lisbon where music, art, and technology converge.

circlesCta.headline: Circles and Counting.
circlesCta.body: These meetups are essential for anyone taking actions with us. Explore what nonviolence is, how we use it and what it can help us achieve. If there isn't a Logos Circle listed in your area, please get in touch with the team.

footer.tagline: Pioneering a new era of freedom.

home.title: Logos — Pioneering a New Era of Freedom
home.description: Logos is a movement building open technology to enable and restore civil society.
home.heading: Pioneering a New Era of Freedom

technologyStack.title: Technology Stack | Logos
technologyStack.description: Modular by design. Storage, Messaging, Blockchain, and User Modules form the foundation for privacy-first decentralized applications.
technologyStack.heading: The Logos Technology Stack

blockchain.title: Blockchain | Logos
blockchain.description: This isn't just another L1—it's a purpose-built blockchain using Cryptarchia, a private proof-of-stake consensus mechanism where validator identities and stake amounts remain hidden.
blockchain.heading: Blockchain

networking.title: Networking Stack | Logos
networking.description: Privacy built from the ground up. The Logos networking layer handles how nodes discover each other, peer, and route messages through a mix-net without exposing identities or metadata.
networking.heading: Networking Stack

messaging.title: Messaging | Logos
messaging.description: Logos Messaging (formerly Waku) was designed and developed as the replacement for Whisper — the messaging protocol of Ethereum. This protocol is used in a number of production applications and provides strong privacy and security guarantees.
messaging.heading: Messaging

storage.title: Storage | Logos
storage.description: Private, Secure, Decentralized Storage. Content-addressed file storage and retrieval with built-in privacy guarantees, built around the Logos Messaging Nim (LMN) node.
storage.heading: Storage

buildersHub.title: Builders Hub | Logos
buildersHub.description: Explore RFPs, submit ideas, install the Logos App, and join a growing community of builders shipping privacy-first decentralized applications.
buildersHub.heading: Logos Builders Hub

ideas.title: Ideas | Logos
ideas.description: Community-submitted ideas for decentralized applications on Logos. Browse active submissions or contribute your own.
ideas.heading: Ideas

rfps.title: RFPs | Logos
rfps.description: Request-for-proposals on Logos. USDC + XP rewards for builders shipping attack-resistant public registries, decentralized archives, private financial networks, and more.
rfps.heading: RFPs

circles.title: Circles | Logos
